segments.text: Alright, what's Mild H.O gonna bring?
segments.original_text: さあマイルドなH.O何を見せてくれるんだ

segments.text: Up throw into up air juggle, but...
segments.original_text: 上に投げて空上で着地狩りだが

segments.text: Nair into down special for the KO!
segments.original_text: ここは空Nから下必殺技撃墜

full_text: Alright, what's Mild H.O gonna bring? Up throw into up air juggle, but... Nair into down special for the KO!
